history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, slightly high-angle selfie of a young person with black hair, wearing a grey hooded sweatshirt and black-rimmed glasses. Their hood is partially pulled up, framing their face. The person's mouth is slightly open, and their head is tilted forward, with their left hand touching the hood near their temple. The sweatshirt has a large, stylized black graphic design on the front, which appears to be text. The background is a cafe or indoor space with a white wall, a wooden shelf with some decorative items on the left, and a window with a view of a street or another part of the building on the right. The lighting is soft and natural, coming from the front and slightly from the side, creating gentle shadows. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of grey, white, and wood, with the black glasses and graphic on the hoodie providing contrast. The overall mood is casual, relaxed, and perhaps a bit introspective.
